overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a post-apocalyptic setting. The clip begins under a concrete overpass with graffiti-covered walls where a campfire burns, then transitions to exploring an abandoned rural area at dusk, featuring a derelict wooden house surrounded by dense forest and overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete overpass shelter with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: campfire ignites in the bottom right corner and begins burning
flames intensify and grow larger, illuminating the immediate area

agents.ego_description: standing still under the overpass, observing the surroundings and the burning fire

entered.detail: large colorful graffiti mural painted on the concrete underpass wall
low concrete seating blocks positioned under the overpass
paved road visible through heavy fog beyond the overpass opening
burning fire that ignites and grows progressively larger during the segment
concrete ceiling and support beams of the bridge overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a concrete overpass shelter with weathered graffiti art on the walls. The camera remains mostly stationary as a campfire ignites and grows in the bottom right corner, casting flickering light on the concrete bench and ground. A foggy road is visible through the opening to the right, with dry grass growing along the verge.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural settlement with derelict wooden structures at dusk

events.description: hard cut from underpass interior to forest exterior with abandoned buildings visible against sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the forested area, panning left to observe the abandoned house and surrounding vegetation

entered.detail: dilapidated dark wooden house with broken windows and damaged roof
rusted vertical metal structure with brick chimney attached
dilapidated wooden picket fence lining the overgrown path
mix of leafless deciduous trees and pine trees surrounding the area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a forest at dusk, with the camera walking forward past a corrugated metal shed toward a derelict wooden house. The sky shows orange sunset hues through the bare trees. As the camera moves, the abandoned house shifts from center to the right side of the frame while a dilapidated wooden fence becomes more prominent on the left. The environment is overgrown with dry vegetation and scattered debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered concrete hideout into a desolate, overgrown rural landscape at dusk. It begins under a concrete overpass where weathered graffiti lines the walls and a campfire ignites in the foreground, casting flickering light across a concrete bench. As the camera moves away from the shelter and the foggy road, the environment abruptly shifts to a dense forest under an orange sunset sky. The perspective then pushes forward past a corrugated metal shed and a dilapidated wooden fence, with the surrounding terrain becoming choked with dry vegetation and scattered debris. Finally, the camera advances toward a derelict wooden house that drifts toward the right side of the frame amidst the bare trees.
